productName: A.C. Topical Drops 4:1 - 1000mg THC 250mg CBN - 1.7 oz
description: A soothing cannabis-infused topical drop formula you apply right where you want it — great for targeted comfort in muscles and joints. Non-intoxicating and easy to use. It blends THC for soothing comfort and CBN for added relaxation in a 4:1 ratio.
